title: dryopteris pubescens
intro: Dryopteris pubescens, also known as the hairy wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family and is native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris pubescens include its use as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory conditions, making it a popular herbal remedy. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
